TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Tou kidi ki tælei k'anna ni-mou-koua ta Pahtatæutau-han ti Jesus-an, k'ma, Timang ta siouro tou vavau ki kidi tou Pei-sa-sou-an ki tounoun ki vulluvullum?
Tou kidi ki tælei k'anna ni-mou-koua ta Pahtatæutau-han ti Jesus-an, k'ma, Timang ta siouro tou vavau ki kidi tou Pei-sasou-an ki tounoun ki vulluvullum?
S.TRANSL: E dier selber uyre quamen de Discipelen tot Jefum leggende Wie is doch de meelte in't Koninckriick der Hemelen $
At the same time came the disciples unto Jesus, saying, Who is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven?
當時，門徒進前來，問耶穌說：「天國裏誰是最大的？」

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-tætæäm ti Jesus ta oussyng ka rauwei pa-oukoua tyni-æn, ni-pa-itou-koua tyni-æn pa-itou-toukad neini-æn,
Ka rou ni-tætæäm ti Jesus ta oussyng ka rauwei pa-oukoua tyni-æn, ni-pa-itou-koua tyni-æn pa-itou-toukad neini-æn,
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesnus een kindeken tot hem geroepen hebbende stelde dat in het midden ban haer
And Jesus called a little child unto him, and set him in the midst of them,
耶穌便叫一個小孩子來，使他站在他們當中，

S.FORM: . Ka ni-k'ma, D'lligh koun-nau-kamou, hejrou assi-kamou si-lala mamyh-kaulaula ki rarauwei, madaæua assi-kamou mou-rbo-ah tou Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vulluvullum.
. Ka ni-k'ma, D'lligh koun-nau-kamou, hejrou assi-kamou si-lala mamyh-kaulaula ki rarauwei, madaæua assi-kamou mou-rbo-ah tou Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vulluvullum.
S.TRANSL: Endesepde Yoorwaer segge ick u indien ghy u niet en berandett ende wordt gelijk de kinderkens fo en sult pin het Koninckryck der emelen geensins ingaen.
And said, Verily I say unto you, Except ye be converted, and become as little children, ye shall not enter into the kingdom of heaven.
說：「我實在告訴你們，你們若不回轉，變成小孩子的樣式，斷不得進天國。

S.FORM: Timamang ta pou-mædo-ah pou-rærim tyni-en ki kidi mama ki rauwei k'atta, teni ta tou vavau ki keirang-en tou Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
Timamang ta pou-mædo-ah pou-rærim tyni-en ki kidi mama ki rauwei k'atta, teni ta tou vavau ki keirang-en tou Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
S.TRANSL: Soowic dan hem [elben sal bernederen gelyck dit kindeken dese 1s de meeste in het koninckriick der Hemelen.
Whosoever therefore shall humble himself as this little child, the same is greatest in the kingdom of heaven.
所以，凡自己謙卑像這小孩子的，他在天國裏就是最大的。

S.FORM: Timamang-appa ta mææuh myhtatallagh ki rauwei ka kom-ma-hynna tou Nanang-au, teni ta mææuh myhtatallagh jau-an.
Timamang-appa ta mææuh myhtatallagh ki rauwei ka kom-ma-hynna tou Nanang-au, teni ta mææuh myhtatallagh jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Ende foo wie foodanig een kindeken. ontfange in mijnen Name die ontfangt my.
And whoso shall receive one such little child in my name receiveth me.
凡為我的名接待一個像這小孩子的，就是接待我。」 （可9‧42－48；路17‧1－2）

S.FORM: Râ timamang ta pa-sai-sala-kouap-ah [pakavarau] ki saäät ki oussyng katta ka tna-msing jau an, masaoun mariang tyni-æn ka poukakud-deih ki vahto ki pa-phud-den ta rÿh tyn, ka pa-ou-rkid-auh tou kalæuhæu-an ki vaoung.

Râ timamang ta pa-sai-sala-kouap-ah [pakavarau] ki saäät ki oussyng katta ka tna-msing jau an, masaoun mariang tyni-æn ka poukakud-deih ki vahto ki pa-phud-den ta rÿh tyn, ka pa-ou-rkid-auh tou kalæuhæu-an ki vaoung.
S.TRANSL: Mae soo wie een ban dese kleyne diem my oieren ben egert Het ware Hem nutter dat een meulen-fteen aen synen hals gehangen ende dat hy bersoncken ware in de diepte de ree,
But whoso shall offend one of these little ones which believe in me, it were better for him that a millstone were hanged about his neck, and that he were drowned in the depth of the sea.
「凡使這信我的一個小子跌倒的，倒不如把大磨石拴在這人的頸項上，沉在深海裏。

S.FORM: Alai ki Næi alei ki pasæi-salakouap-pen paka varau: rå ki-di-ato ka ierou-'ah ta pasai-sala-kouap-pen pakavarau: ka alæi ki tau ka pa-ieroua ki pasai-sala-kou-ap-pen pakavarau.
Alai ki Næi alei ki pasæi-salakouap-pen paka varau: rå ki-di-ato ka ierou-'ah ta pasai-sala-kouap-pen pakavarau: ka alæi ki tau ka pa-ieroua ki pasai-sala-kou-ap-pen pakavarau.
S.TRANSL: Wee der werelt ban de ngemillen:want het is nootsakelick dac de ergernissen Komen; Doch wee dien mensche door welcken de ergerniise komt.
Woe unto the world because of offences! for it must needs be that offences come; but woe to that man by whom the offence cometh!
這世界有禍了，因為將人絆倒；絆倒人的事是免不了的，但那絆倒人的有禍了！

S.FORM: Heirou ka paka-varau ym-hou-an ta rima-'ho lava, ki rahpal appa-'mhou lava, luk't-au, aryng-an-ei smaki-tæuah ymhou-an. Ma saoun mariang ymhouan mou-rbo ki kæuag-han rou mapilei kow la va, ou mapykka kow lava, râ ka rourouha kow ki rima lava, rou-roula ki rahpal lava, aryng-an-eil ato smaki-koua tou apoei ka myh kakoua myd-darynnough.

Heirou ka paka-varau ym-hou-an ta rima-'ho lava, ki rahpal appa-'mhou lava, luk't-au, aryng-an-ei smaki-tæuah ymhou-an. Ma saoun mariang ymhouan mou-rbo ki kæuag-han rou mapilei kow la va, ou mapykka kow lava, râ ka rourouha kow ki rima lava, rou-roula ki rahpal lava, aryng-an-eil ato smaki-koua tou apoei ka myh kakoua myd-darynnough.
S.TRANSL: Indien dan uwe handt ofte uwe boet u erghert houwt'le af ende werpt fe ban u. Het is u beter tot den leben in te gaen kreupel ofte bermincket [zijnde, JDan twee anden ofte twee boeten hebende in het eeuwighe bper geworpen te worden.

Wherefore if thy hand or thy foot offend thee, cut them off, and cast them from thee: it is better for thee to enter into life halt or maimed, rather than having two hands or two feet to be cast into everlasting fire.
倘若你一隻手，或是一隻腳，叫你跌倒，就砍下來丟掉。你缺一隻手，或是一隻腳，進入永生，強如有兩手兩腳被丟在永火裏。

S.FORM: . Heirou ka pakavarau ym-hou-an ta mattæ oho, kmæd-, aryng-an-ei ymhou-an. Masaoun mariang ymhou-an ka idi kow ki matta mou-rbo-ah tou kæuag-han, ka rourouha kow ki matta saki-kouaan-eih tou apoei ki kalau-hau-ani.

. Heirou ka pakavarau ym-hou-an ta mattæ oho, kmæd-, aryng-an-ei ymhou-an. Masaoun mariang ymhou-an ka idi kow ki matta mou-rbo-ah tou kæuag-han, ka rourouha kow ki matta saki-kouaan-eih tou apoei ki kalau-hau-ani.
S.TRANSL: Ende indien uwe ooge u ergere trecktse uyt ende werptse ban n. Hec is n beter mae? ten ooge hebbende tot het leben in te gaen dan twee oogen hebbende in het helhe byer gheworpen te wor en
And if thine eye offend thee, pluck it out, and cast it from thee: it is better for thee to enter into life with one eye, rather than having two eyes to be cast into hell fire.
倘若你一隻眼叫你跌倒，就把它剜出來丟掉。你只有一隻眼進入永生，強如有兩隻眼被丟在地獄的火裏。」 （路15‧3－7）

S.FORM: Kytt'ei ka assi-kamou mou-roung-à ki saäät ki oussyng k'anna ka pa-sousou-en-au-ka-mou, ka myhkakoua mararau ta Tama-Gnau nein ki vlung ki Ræ-ma-au, ka tou tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
Kytt'ei ka assi-kamou mou-roung-à ki saäät ki oussyng k'anna ka pa-sousou-en-au-ka-mou, ka myhkakoua mararau ta Tama-Gnau nein ki vlung ki Ræ-ma-au, ka tou tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
S.TRANSL: Hiet toe dat ghy niet een ban dese klenne en beracht: want ick segge ulieden dat hare Engelen in] de eHemelen altydt sien Het aengelicht myns Vaders die in de Hemelenis, .
Take heed that ye despise not one of these little ones; for I say unto you, That in heaven their angels do always behold the face of my Father which is in heaven.
「你們要小心，不可輕看這小子裏的一個；我告訴你們，他們的使者在天上，常見我天父的面。

S.FORM: Ka ierou'ato ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou pa-ra-riang-ei ki âtta ka ni-taurumm'-ato.
Ka ierou'ato ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou pa-ra-riang-ei ki âtta ka ni-taurumm'-ato.
S.TRANSL: Want de Sone des menlchen is gekomt om alig te makt dat berlort was.
For the Son of man is come to save that which was lost.

S.FORM: Pæh-mang-kamou pæh-dimdim, heirou akoumea ta tima-mang ki tau sat kæ ætoughan ki joeko, ka rou miä-rm'ato lava ki sasat ki atta, assi kaua pa-itou-ka-kou-eih tyn ta matouda kytti-æn 'æb ki matouda, ka rou mou-vouk-ky-voukkyn, assi kaua kmi'ym-ah ki miärm'ato k'anna?

Pæh-mang-kamou pæh-dimdim, heirou akoumea ta tima-mang ki tau sat kæ ætoughan ki joeko, ka rou miä-rm'ato lava ki sasat ki atta, assi kaua pa-itou-ka-kou-eih tyn ta matouda kytti-æn 'æb ki matouda, ka rou mou-vouk-ky-voukkyn, assi kaua kmi'ym-ah ki miärm'ato k'anna?
S.TRANSL: Watdunckt u mdien eenigh mensche houdert schapen hadde ende een upt deselbe af-gedwaelt ware en sal hy niet de neghen entnegentigh laten ende op de bergen henen gaende het afgedwarlde soecken $
How think ye? if a man have an hundred sheep, and one of them be gone astray, doth he not leave the ninety and nine, and goeth into the mountains, and seeketh that which is gone astray?
一個人若有一百隻羊，一隻走迷了路，你們的意思如何？他豈不撇下這九十九隻，往山裏去找那隻迷路的羊嗎？

S.FORM: Ka rou k'mato-hynna ka paki-valei-en tyn ta atta: D'lligh koun-næu-kamou-râ, ka masaoun marei alei ki anna, ki matouda kytti-æn 'æb ki matouda, k'assi ni-miarma.
Ka rou k'mato-hynna ka paki-valei-en tyn ta atta: D'lligh koun-næu-kamou-râ, ka masaoun marei alei ki anna, ki matouda kytti-æn 'æb ki matouda, k'assi ni-miarma.
S.TRANSL: Ende indien het ghefchiet dat hy het selbe bindt: Doorwae: ick seggeu dathy Hem meer betblijdt ober het Tele dan ober de negen-entmegentigh die niet af-ghedwaelt en zijn geweel.
And if so be that he find it, verily I say unto you, he rejoiceth more of that sheep, than of the ninety and nine which went not astray.
若是找着了，我實在告訴你們，他為這一隻羊歡喜，比為那沒有迷路的九十九隻歡喜還大呢！

S.FORM: Koumm-'appa-hynna assi kamoei-in ki Raraman-oumi ka tou tounnoun ki vulluvullum, ka taurumma-ah ta saäät ki oussyng k'attæ.
Koumm-'appa-hynna assi kamoei-in ki Raraman-oumi ka tou tounnoun ki vulluvullum, ka taurumma-ah ta saäät ki oussyng k'attæ.
S.TRANSL: Allo en is De wille niet nwes Yaders die in de Hemelen 1s dat een ban dese Klepneberloren gae.
Even so it is not the will of your Father which is in heaven, that one of these little ones should perish.
你們在天上的父也是這樣，不願意這小子裏失喪一個。」

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-mavarau lava ymhou-an ta tæ'i-appara oho, ou-kouâ matym'ha mak-tavægh tyni-æn tou snæh tou saät ymoumi-æn: heirou millingigh ta teni ymhou-an, doumiaka ni-pou-'than-en-hou ta tæ'i-appara oho.

Ka rou ni-mavarau lava ymhou-an ta tæ'i-appara oho, ou-kouâ matym'ha mak-tavægh tyni-æn tou snæh tou saät ymoumi-æn: heirou millingigh ta teni ymhou-an, doumiaka ni-pou-'than-en-hou ta tæ'i-appara oho.
S.TRANSL: Mae indien uwe broeder tegen u gesondight heeft gaet henen ende beraft hem tufschen u ende Hem alleen : indien hy u Hoort soo hebt ghy uwen broeder gewonnen.
Moreover if thy brother shall trespass against thee, go and tell him his fault between thee and him alone: if he shall hear thee, thou hast gained thy brother.
「倘若你的弟兄得罪你，你就去，趁着只有他和你在一處的時候，指出他的錯來。他若聽你，你便得了你的弟兄；

S.FORM: Irou râ assi milling-igh ta teni ymhou-an, dou-miaka patouh-para ymhou-an ki saät lava ki rou-rouha lava ki vouel, alei ka itou-shut-al-ato itou-koua ta ymmid ki sou tou moutous ki rarouha ki tatouro lava ki Tama-heil.

Irou râ assi millingigh ta teni ymhou-an, dou-miaka patouh-para ymhou-an ki saät lava ki rou-rouha lava ki vouel, alei ka itou-shut-al-ato itou-koua ta ymmid ki sou tou moutous ki rarouha ki tatouro lava ki Tama-heil.
S.TRANSL: Maermdienhp [u] _ niet niet en hoort soo neemt nocheen ofte twee meth: op dat in den mondt ban twee ofte drie getuygen alle woort beliae.
But if he will not hear thee, then take with thee one or two more, that in the mouth of two or three witnesses every word may be established.
他若不聽，你就另外帶一兩個人同去，要憑兩三個人的口作見證，句句都可定準。

S.FORM: Ka rou assi millingigh-a neini-æn, anna ta banna-vanna-ato ki Pako-i-sal-lan ka rou assi-appa millingigh-ah ki Pako-i-sal-lan, anna ta mamei-al-ato ta teni ym-hou-an mama ki Heidang ki Tæ-ma-imugh.
Ka rou assi millingigh-a neini-æn, anna ta banna-vanna-ato ki Pako-i-sal-lan ka rou assi-appa millingigh-ah ki Pako-i-sal-lan, anna ta mamei-al-ato ta teni ym-hou-an mama ki Heidang ki Tæ-ma-imugh.
S.TRANSL: Ende indien hy deselbe geen gehoor en geeft so seght het der Gemeynte : ende indien hy oock der Ghemeynte geen gehoor en geeft oo ry hyu als de heyden ende de tollenaer.
And if he shall neglect to hear them, tell it unto the church: but if he neglect to hear the church, let him be unto thee as an heathen man and a publican.
若是不聽他們，就告訴教會；若是不聽教會，就看他像外邦人和稅吏一樣。

S.FORM: Dlligh koun-nau-kamou-rå: Kamamang ka væuut-au-mou-mi tou Næi, vuut-eih ta anna tou tounnoun ki vullum: kamamang-appa ka 'ææu-vavæuut-ei-mou-mi tou Næi, 'ææu-vavæunt-eih ta anna tou tounnoun ki vullum.

Dlligh koun-nau-kamou-rå: Kamamang ka væuut-au-mou-mi tou Næi, vuut-eih ta anna tou tounnoun ki vullum: kamamang-appa ka 'ææu-vavæuut-ei-mou-mi tou Næi, 'ææu-vavæunt-eih ta anna tou tounnoun ki vullum.
S.TRANSL: Doorwae segghe ick u; Al wat ghy op der aerden binden sult sal in den Hemel ghebonden wesen : ende al wat ghy op der aerden ontbinden sult sal iden Hemel ontbonden wesen,
Verily I say unto you, Whatsoever ye shall bind on earth shall be bound in heaven: and whatsoever ye shall loose on earth shall be loosed in heaven.
「我實在告訴你們，凡你們在地上所捆綁的，在天上也要捆綁；凡你們在地上所釋放的，在天上也要釋放。

S.FORM: Mila pa-sousou-en-au-ka-mou, Heirou mæuakla ki rÿh ta rourouha ki voual ymoumi-æn tou Næi, alei ki mamang ka tou-mimi-æu nein, hahei-eih neini-æn ki Raraman-au ka tou tounnoun ki vulluvullum.
Mila pa-sousou-en-au-ka-mou, Heirou mæuakla ki rÿh ta rourouha ki voual ymoumi-æn tou Næi, alei ki mamang ka tou-mimi-æu nein, hahei-eih neini-æn ki Raraman-au ka tou tounnoun ki vulluvullum.
S.TRANSL: Wederom segge ick n Indien daer twee ban u te faiht ttemmen op der aerden ober eenige sake die sy sonden mogen begeeren dat die hae sal gechiedt ban myn# Dade die in de Hemelen 18,
Again I say unto you, That if two of you shall agree on earth as touching any thing that they shall ask, it shall be done for them of my Father which is in heaven.
我又告訴你們，若是你們中間有兩個人在地上同心合意地求甚麼事，我在天上的父必為他們成全。

S.FORM: Ka toumamang ta mæu-i-sal-ato rarouha lava tatouro lava ki voual tou Nanang-au, a'ia-tou-kad koh hynna neini-æn.
Ka toumamang ta mæu-i-sal-ato rarouha lava tatouro lava ki voual tou Nanang-au, a'ia-tou-kad koh hynna neini-æn.
S.TRANSL: Want waer twee ofte due bergadert zijn in mijnen Name daer ben ick in het midden ban haer.
For where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I in the midst of them.
因為無論在哪裏，有兩三個人奉我的名聚會，那裏就有我在他們中間。」

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna jerou-'ato tyni-æn ta ti Petrus, ka ni-k'ma, Meirang, mapynan-'ah ma-varau jau-an ta tæ'i-a-para-au, ki atta-ral-ei-mau tyni-æn ? matta-pyttoul kaua?
Tou kidi k'anna jerou-'ato tyni-æn ta ti Petrus, ka ni-k'ma, Meirang, mapynan-'ah ma-varau jau-an ta tæ'i-a-para-au, ki atta-ral-ei-mau tyni-æn ? matta-pyttoul kaua?
S.TRANSL: Doe quam Petrus tot hem ende eyde Heere hoe menigmael sal myn broeder tegen my sondigen mds ick em hem bergheben + Tot sebenmael +
Then came Peter to him, and said, Lord, how oft shall my brother sin against me, and I forgive him? till seven times?
那時，彼得進前來，對耶穌說：「主啊，我弟兄得罪我，我當饒恕他幾次呢？到七次可以嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Assi-koh matta-pyttoul k'ma ymhou-an, râ sauh-pyttou-appa kytti-æn sauh-pyttoul.
Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Assi-koh matta-pyttoul k'ma ymhou-an, râ sauh-pyttou-appa kytti-æn sauh-pyttoul.
S.TRANSL: Jesus leyde tot hem Ick en legge u niet tot lebenmael mae? tot tlebentigh mael seben-[mael.]
Jesus saith unto him, I say not unto thee, Until seven times: but, Until seventy times seven.
耶穌說：「我對你說，不是到七次，乃是到七十個七次。

S.FORM: Alei ki atta, ka papæmyh kaulaul'an ta Pei-sasou-an ki toun-noun ki vullu-vullum ki Si-bavæu ka Mei-sasou, ka mamoei mei-sal kuhtung ki koung-cia tyn-da.
Alei ki atta, ka papæmyh kaulaul'an ta Pei-sasou-an ki toun-noun ki vullu-vullum ki Si-bavæu ka Mei-sasou, ka mamoei mei-sal kuhtung ki koung-cia tyn-da.
S.TRANSL: Daeroniwort het Koninckryck de Hemelen bergeleken by een scke; Koning die reeckeninghe met shne dienstknechten hound? wilde.
Therefore is the kingdom of heaven likened unto a certain king, which would take account of his servants.
天國好像一個王要和他僕人算帳。

S.FORM: Irou ka mai-naunamou kubtung ta teni, ni-ad-din tyni-æn saät ki voual ka kau-itting-en sat kytti-æn ka tounnoun-nan ki Tæ-lenten.
Irou ka mai-naunamou kubtung ta teni, ni-ad-din tyni-æn saät ki voual ka kau-itting-en sat kytti-æn ka tounnoun-nan ki Tæ-lenten.
S.TRANSL: Als hy nu begon te reeckenen wierdt tot hem gebracht een die hem schuldigh was tien duylent talenten.
And when he had begun to reckon, one was brought unto him, which owed him ten thousand talents.
才算的時候，有人帶了一個欠一千萬銀子的來。

S.FORM: Irou ka aou-si ki poudada-auh ta teni, ni-madinghi ta Mei-rang ka pa-peil-an-eih ta teni, ta kaian tyn, ta alalak tyn, ki ma-mang-appa ka ah-teni, tou pa'ä-vli-en pa ä-msing poudaæuh [ki kæu-itting-en k'anna.]

Irou ka aou-si ki poudada-auh ta teni, ni-madinghi ta Mei-rang ka pa-peil-an-eih ta teni, ta kaian tyn, ta alalak tyn, ki ma-mang-appa ka ah-teni, tou pa'ä-vli-en pa ä-msing poudaæuh [ki kæu-itting-en k'anna.]
S.TRANSL: Endeals hy niet en Hadde om te betalen bebal tin Heere datmen hem sonde berkoopen ende shn wyf ende kinderen ende al wat Hy hadde ende dat[de {chult] foude betaelt worden.
But forasmuch as he had not to pay, his lord commanded him to be sold, and his wife, and children, and all that he had, and payment to be made.
因為他沒有甚麼償還之物，主人吩咐把他和他妻子兒女，並一切所有的都賣了償還。

S.FORM: Ka rou mahgakub ta koun-cia, ni-reip tyni-æn, koun, Meirang mæia-mila-appa jau-an, pa'-ymd-ei-mau kow pou-dæ-æuh.
Ka rou mahgakub ta koun-cia, ni-reip tyni-æn, koun, Meirang mæia-mila-appa jau-an, pa'-ymd-ei-mau kow pou-dæ-æuh.
S.TRANSL: De dienltknecht dan neder ballende aenbadt hem leggende Heere weest lanckmoedigh ober my ende ick sal n alles betalen.
The servant therefore fell down, and worshipped him, saying, Lord, have patience with me, and I will pay thee all.
那僕人就俯伏拜他，說：『主啊，寬容我，將來我都要還清。』

S.FORM: Irou ha mararÿh-ato ma-harim ta Meirang ki kouncia k'an-na, ni-atta-ral tyni-æn matta tyn-no ki kæu-itting-en.
Irou ha mararÿh-ato ma-harim ta Meirang ki kouncia k'an-na, ni-atta-ral tyni-æn matta tyn-no ki kæu-itting-en.
S.TRANSL: Ende de Heere deses dienstknechts met baymherrighepdr innerlick beweegt zijnde heeft hem ontsiiagen ende de [chult hem quijt ghesrholden.
Then the lord of that servant was moved with compassion, and loosed him, and forgave him the debt.
那僕人的主人就動了慈心，把他釋放了，並且免了他的債。

S.FORM: Irou râ tpæpæh ta kouncia k'anna, ni-kabalei tyn ta saät ki kouncia ka na lam tyn, ka kæu-itting-en tyn sat kæ'æ̈toug-han ki malyttok, ka rou mihakub, ni-meiseyd ki rÿh tyni-æn, koun, Pou-dææug-ha jau-an ki kæu-it-ting-'nau ymhou-an.

Irou râ tpæpæh ta kouncia k'anna, ni-kabalei tyn ta saät ki kouncia ka na lam tyn, ka kæu-itting-en tyn sat kæ'æ̈toug-han ki malyttok, ka rou mihakub, ni-meiseyd ki rÿh tyni-æn, koun, Pou-dææug-ha jau-an ki kæu-it-ting-'nau ymhou-an.
S.TRANSL: Mae? deselbe dienltknecht knecht uytgaende heeft ghebonden eenen ijner mededienstknechten die hem hondert penningen schuldig was ende hem aenbattende geeep [hem] bp de kele seggende Betaelt my dat ghy schuldigh ryt.
But the same servant went out, and found one of his fellowservants, which owed him an hundred pence: and he laid hands on him, and took him by the throat, saying, Pay me that thou owest.
「那僕人出來，遇見他的一個同伴欠他十兩銀子，便揪着他，掐住他的喉嚨，說：『你把所欠的還我！』

S.FORM: Anna ta rou mahgakub ta na lam tyn ka k'uncia tou rahpal tyn, ni-tmoumimia tyni-æn, koun, Maia-mila-appa jæu-an, ka pa'ä-ymd-ei-mau kow pou-daæuh.
Anna ta rou mahgakub ta na lam tyn ka k'uncia tou rahpal tyn, ni-tmoumimia tyni-æn, koun, Maia-mila-appa jæu-an, ka pa'ä-ymd-ei-mau kow pou-daæuh.
S.TRANSL: Syn mede dienstknecht dan neder-ballen aen lhjne boets bad hem seggende Zijt lanckmoedigh ober my esi ick salu alles betalen.
And his fellowservant fell down at his feet, and besought him, saying, Have patience with me, and I will pay thee all.
他的同伴就俯伏央求他，說：『寬容我吧，將來我必還清。』

S.FORM: Râ ni-ynnang ta teni: ka rou d'marang ni-poukoua tyni-æn tou sangat, tou kidi-appa k'anna ka pou-dææuh-an-ei tyn ta kæu-itting-en.
Râ ni-ynnang ta teni: ka rou d'marang ni-poukoua tyni-æn tou sangat, tou kidi-appa k'anna ka pou-dææuh-an-ei tyn ta kæu-itting-en.
S.TRANSL: Ooch hy en wilde met : mae: gingh henen ende wierp hem in de ghebancKenisse tot dat hy de schult soudebetaelt hebben,
And he would not: but went and cast him into prison, till he should pay the debt.
他不肯，竟去把他下在監裏，等他還了所欠的債。

S.FORM: Dou kakytt'an ki kouncia ka lalam tyn ki ni-pæm'tten, ou-hang ni-mi-voulas ta neni, ka rou iroua, ni-vanna-vanna ki Meirang nein ki mamang ka ni-pamt-ten-atou-râ.
Dou kakytt'an ki kouncia ka lalam tyn ki ni-pæm'tten, ou-hang ni-mi-voulas ta neni, ka rou iroua, ni-vanna-vanna ki Meirang nein ki mamang ka ni-pamt-ten-atou-râ.
S.TRANSL: Als nu shne mededienltknechten sagen t gene geschiet was zijn sy Ceer beDroeft geworde efi komende berklaerden sy haren Heere al watter gechiee was.
So when his fellowservants saw what was done, they were very sorry, and came and told unto their lord all that was done.
眾同伴看見他所做的事就甚憂愁，去把這事都告訴了主人。

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna ni-tæta æm ta teni pa-oukoua tyni-æn ki Meirang tyn, ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Kouncia ka mat-e, ni-atta-nynno-en-au-kow atta-ral ymmid ki ni-kæu-itting-en-au k'anna, alei ka ni-tmoumimia kow jau-an.

Tou kidi k'anna ni-tæta æm ta teni pa-oukoua tyni-æn ki Meirang tyn, ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Kouncia ka mat-e, ni-atta-nynno-en-au-kow atta-ral ymmid ki ni-kæu-itting-en-au k'anna, alei ka ni-tmoumimia kow jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Doe heeft hem fijn Heere tot hem gheroepen ende seyde tot hem Ghy boose dienltknecht alle die schuldt hebbe ick u quijt gescholden dewyle ghy mp gebeden hebr.
Then his lord, after that he had called him, said unto him, O thou wicked servant, I forgave thee all that debt, because thou desiredst me:
於是主人叫了他來，對他說：『你這惡奴才！你央求我，我就把你所欠的都免了，

S.FORM: Ynna-mouhou kaua kaha-rum-ta kouncia ka na lam oho, mama ki ni-kaharum-en-au ym-hou-an?
Ynna-mouhou kaua kaha-rum-ta kouncia ka na lam oho, mama ki ni-kaharum-en-au ym-hou-an?
S.TRANSL: Behoordet ghy oock niet u ober uw? mede dienltknecht te onefermen gelijck ick oock my ober u ontfermt hebbe
Shouldest not thou also have had compassion on thy fellowservant, even as I had pity on thee?
你不應當憐恤你的同伴，像我憐恤你嗎？』

S.FORM: Ka rou mangale ta Mei-rang tyn, ni-pæ'ǣ-tounnoun-en tyn tyni-æn ki tama-khaut, tou kidi-al-appa k'anna ka pou-daauh-an-ei tyn ta ymmid ki mamang ka kæuitting-en tyn tyni-æn.
Ka rou mangale ta Mei-rang tyn, ni-pæ'ǣ-tounnoun-en tyn tyni-æn ki tama-khaut, tou kidi-al-appa k'anna ka pou-daauh-an-ei tyn ta ymmid ki mamang ka kæuitting-en tyn tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende syn Heere betoornt zijnde leberde hem den pynders oper tot dat hy soude betaelt hebben al wat hy hem schuldigh was,
And his lord was wroth, and delivered him to the tormentors, till he should pay all that was due unto him.
主人就大怒，把他交給掌刑的，等他還清了所欠的債。

S.FORM: Hmei-k'ma-al-appa-hynna ymoumi-æn ta Rara-man-au ka æ'ia tounnoun ki vullum, rou assi kamou matta-raryh ta maihbovoel atta-ral ki tæ'i-a-para-oumi ki væ-rau nein. Ka sasat kytti-an 'ab ki matouda kilbeh ki soulat.

Hmei-k'ma-al-appa-hynna ymoumi-æn ta Rara-man-au ka æ'ia tounnoun ki vullum, rou assi kamou matta-raryh ta maihbovoel atta-ral ki tæ'i-a-para-oumi ki væ-rau nein. Ka sasat kytti-an 'ab ki matouda kilbeh ki soulat.
S.TRANSL: Alsoo sal oock mijn hemelsche Dader u doen indim ghy niet ban herten en bergeeft een yeghelijck Gnen broeder shne misdaen.
So likewise shall my heavenly Father do also unto you, if ye from your hearts forgive not every one his brother their trespasses.
你們各人若不從心裏饒恕你的弟兄，我天父也要這樣待你們了。」
